title: Bright/Dark Star Circus
description: We want true vaudevillian variety and are looking for: magicians, musicians, dancers, clowns, acrobats, stand-ups, silly songsters, puppeteers, sketch comedians, hypnotists, jugglers, snake charmers, aerialists, balloon artists, strongmen, contortionists, plate spinners, ventriloquists, sword swallowers, dog trainers, quick-change artists, stupid human tricksters, roller skate dancers, mentalists, contortionists, hula hoop jugglers, and anything else that will dazzle our audience. Group and solo acts welcome.

title: Family Game Show Show
description:
Stars and Garters Theater is seeking performers for a new interactive family comedy inspired by television game shows.

Audience teams compete in trivia, puzzles, physical challenges, and comedy games while traveling through seventy years of game show history aboard the Game Show Time Machine.

The show will happen every Saturday at 1pm, (with a call time of 12:30) starting Aug 1. We will have 3 rehearsals the Saturdays leading up to the first show.

Family Game Show Show is designed for audiences ages 6 to 96. All aspects of performance will be "family-friendly".

title: Red Velvet Comedy
description:
Bring your best 5 minutes to Red Velvet Comedy, a competition mic in which winners are given paid slots in Stars & Garters' comedy, variety, and burlesque shows. Only 25 slots; pre-registration required using this form.

Comics will be judged by two rotating judges plus an audience vote, so bring your friends and pad your stats!

One-drink minimum.

title: Rising Stars
description: We at Rising Stars recognize that as a new or developing burlesque or variety performer in Chicago, it can be difficult to have performance opportunities. Therefore, we are looking to provide that space for performers that desire the experience and to develop their art! Whether it is your FIRST performance ever, or you've been steadily developing your acts, this is the space for you! If you aren't chosen for a show right away, we will provide feedback & guidance on act development and/or keep you in the talent pool for future shows. The goal is to get as many folks on stage that want to be!

title: The Gap
description: The Gap is a new stand-up showcase show at Stars & Garters designed to give local comics performance opportunities...and fill gaps in our theater schedule. We are looking for a diverse group of experienced or up-and-coming Chicago talent who are prepared to do a 10-minute set in exchange for a ticket-split and eternal glory. Half of total tickets sales will be split amongst performers.

title: M.A.S.T.E.R.M.I.N.D.S.
description: Calling all evil-doers, swindlers, and ne'er-do-wells! Chicago's most nefarious power point-driven character comedy show needs you! Each M.A.S.T.E.R.M.I.N.D.S. (Menaces Assessing Strategic Tactics End Rogues Making Intelligent Maneuvers Diabolically Shhh) show is a board meeting of villains, during which four dastardly characters each present an evil scheme via slides to each other and to the audience.
